content_body: This was my first time going to the mountains, and it was more than I expected! Riverivew Lodge is a nice and clean cabin to relax and enjoy family. Supplies were available such as garbage bags, dish detergent, and toilet tissue. There were more than enough of silverware, large serving spoons and forks, dish towels, dishes, pots, and pans. There was a lot of space and seating inside and out for our large family gathering! If we needed to contact anyone for information, Ms. Taylor was readily available. The scenery was BEAUTIFUL! We plan to come back.
title: The Perfect Cabin for a Family Reunion!
